# LinkedIn Autopilot V2
> Fully autonomous LinkedIn content and engagement pipeline with 40+ AI agents across 5 teams.

## What This Project Does
LinkedIn Autopilot V2 automates the entire LinkedIn content lifecycle: researching trends, writing posts, enforcing quality, publishing content, engaging with influencer posts, responding to audience comments, tracking influencers, and learning from campaign performance. It runs on a scheduler with configurable cron jobs.

## Tech Stack
- Python 3.11+
- Anthropic Claude API (primary LLM)
- APScheduler (cron-based scheduling)
- Docker (containerized deployment)
- Browser automation: Airtop (cloud) or Browser Use (local)
- Airtable (data persistence)
- Resend (email delivery)

## Architecture
- 5 teams: Content, Engagement, Influencer, Profile, Learning
- 40+ agents, each with a markdown prompt file in prompts/
- All agents inherit from agents/base.py (BaseAgent)
- Two schedulers: scheduler.py (content), scheduler_engagement.py (engagement)
- Config via YAML in config/ (gitignored), templates in config_examples/

## Key Entry Points
- main.py -- Start scheduler or run teams manually (--run content|engagement|influencer|profile|all)
- scheduler.py -- Content pipeline cron jobs
- scheduler_engagement.py -- Engagement pipeline cron jobs

## Important Files
- CLAUDE.md -- 52 operational rules + session protocols
- AGENTS.md -- Full agent registry
- ARCHITECTURE.md -- Detailed system architecture
- agents/base.py -- BaseAgent class
- config_examples/ -- Config templates
- prompts/ -- 18 agent prompt files

## Environment Variables
- ANTHROPIC_API_KEY (required)
- SERPER_API_KEY, RESEND_API_KEY, PHANTOMBUSTER_API_KEY, OPENAI_API_KEY (optional)
- AIRTOP_API_KEY or BROWSER_USE_API_KEY (browser backend)
- BROWSER_BACKEND=airtop|browser_use

## Constraints
- LinkedIn rate limits enforced via scheduler cooldowns
- No duplicate posts (embedding-based dedup)
- All content passes quality pipeline (editor + fact checker)
- Cookies/sessions are sensitive -- never log or commit
- No hardcoded timezones
